name: RADNOSTIX INC
summary: Radnostix Inc. (formerly International Isotopes Inc.) manufactures radioisotope-focused products for medical and industrial applications across five segments: Theranostics Products (including FDA-approved generic sodium iodide I-131), Cobalt Products (cobalt-60 sealed sources), Calibration & Reference Products (sealed source calibration tools for SPECT/PET imaging), Medical Devices (EasyFill Automated Capsule System, lung ventilation devices), and Fluorine Products (fluoride gases via Fluorine Extraction Process). The company operates through subsidiaries including RadQual LLC, RadVent LLC, and TI Services LLC.

products.name: Sodium Iodide I-131
products.description: FDA-approved generic radiopharmaceutical drug product; only such generic manufactured in the U.S.

products.name: Cobalt-60 Sealed Sources
products.description: Cobalt-60 sources for radiation therapy, industrial and medical applications, and recycling of expended sources.

products.name: Calibration & Reference Products
products.description: Sealed source calibration and reference products for SPECT/PET imaging, radiopharmacy, and lab equipment.

products.name: EasyFill Automated Capsule System
products.description: Robotic lab device for automated capsule filling, paired with I-131 theranostics products; targeting Q3 2026 rollout.

products.name: Swirler Radioaerosol System
products.description: Medical device for lung ventilation acquired from AMICI, Inc.; under development for 2026 release.

products.name: Tru-Fit Mouthpiece
products.description: Medical accessory acquired from AMICI, Inc.; under development for 2026 release via RadVent subsidiary.

products.name: Xenon System Products
products.description: Lung ventilation system products acquired from AMICI, Inc. in January 2025; under development for 2026 release.

products.name: Radiosynthesis Modules (Scintomics ATT)
products.description: Third-party radiosynthesis modules distributed under a distribution and servicing agreement with Scintomics ATT.

products.name: Fluorine Extraction Process (FEP) Gases
products.description: Fluoride gases produced via proprietary Fluorine Extraction Process, tied to planned DUF6 de-conversion facility.

partnerships.description: Joint venture PhanQual for pre-clinical sealed sources and distribution of fillable sources.
Bilateral relationship for distribution of non-medical sealed source calibration and reference standards.
Distribution and servicing agreement for complete line of radiosynthesis modules.
Asset purchase agreement for manufacturing molds, device registrations, trademarks, and production rights to lung ventilation and Xenon system products.
